be firm in disposition and be endowed with prowess.
11.BIRTH WITH AKASA TATWA.
One born with the reflection of AKASA TATWA (ether) will be endowed with a physique with the
brightness of crystal and of a gem. Just as wealth confers happiness this reflection will make
one achieve effects of TriVargas (i.e. the three objects of worldly existence, viz. Dharma, or
moral merits, Artha, or attainment of riches, or worldly prosperity and Kama, or desire of
sensual enjoymentthese three ends form the well known triad excluding Moksha, or final
emancipation).
12.BIRTH WITH JALA TATWA (water).
One born with the reflection of watery tatwa will be glossy, will have the complexion of white
Durva grass, will receive protection as, if from the mother and will prosper.
13.BIRTH WITH VAYU TATWA (air).
